features: Package Contents: You'll receive 4 red star hair clips, 4 pink star hair clips, and 4 red hair bow. With ample quantity and a variety of styles, you can create different styles based on your outfit and mood.

Reliable Material: Our red hair accessories are made of high-quality polyester and metal, with a smooth surface that resists fading and breaking. They are durable and sturdy, allowing for long-lasting wear.

Unique Design: Our star clips feature a simple and stylish star shape, while the bow hairpins are finished in classic red with a tassel bow and long hair tails, adding a touch of sophistication to any look and helping you create a cool and sweet hairstyle.

Easy to Use: The star clips feature a snap design for easy opening and closing, while the red hair bows feature a metal alligator clip for easy wearing, helping to secure your hair and keep it in place all day long.

Wide Application: Our red accessories for women are suitable for all hairstyles, including curly, straight, long, and short hair. They are suitable for everyday wear, parties, weddings, anniversaries, Halloween, Christmas, and other occasions, making you stand out and exude charm.
description: Our star hair clips features a simple yet stylish star design. The classic red hair bow clip is accented with a tasselled bow and a long hair tail, adding a touch of sophistication to any look. It helps you to create cool, sweet hairstyles. It is suitable for curly, straight, long or short hair and is perfect for everyday wear and special occasions such as parties, weddings, anniversaries, Halloween and Christmas. Specifications: Material: Polyester, Iron Color: Red, Pink Dimensions: Star Hairpin: 3*3cm/1.18*1.18in Bow Hairpin: 37*10cm/14.57*3.94in Packing List: 4*Red Star Hairpins 4*Pink Star Hairpins 4*Red Bow Hairpins
